sections_cited: section 117 of the Land Revenue Act

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1574 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 20-12-2023 Syed Imtiaz Ali Shah Jillani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w Asif Raza Soomro, Mukhtiartkar, Gambat on behalf of Assistant Commissioner, Gambat. ***** It is the case of petitioner that he has filed an application to the Assistant Commissioner, Gambat under section 117 of the Land Revenue Act for demarcation of land bearing survey Nos. 116, 1134 and 1135 and others, situated in Deh Jamra Taluka Gambat, but the same has not been entertained. Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Gambat is present and undertakes that application of the petitioner would be decided in accordance with law and order would be communicated to him in writing within a period of one month. Learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and accordingly the petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
